entity.summary: Decentralized spot and perpetual-trading venue formed through the integration of Astherus and APX Finance and publicly introduced under the Aster identity in March 2025.
entity.notes: HEI models Aster as one protocol-level entity rather than separate Aster Spot, Aster DEX, and product/version records. Astherus and APX Finance are retained as aliases because first-party documentation describes their integration as the origin of the Aster identity.

events.title: Aster identity introduced
events.description: Astherus and APX Finance adopted the Aster identity for the integrated decentralized trading venue.
events.notes: The event combines integration and rebrand continuity; Aster is the current active identity.

events.title: APX to ASTER migration opened
events.description: Aster opened the staged APX-to-ASTER token migration process.
events.notes: The migration provides identity-continuity evidence between APX and Aster.

evidence.title: What is Aster?
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Aster as the identity created after Astherus merged with APX Finance.

evidence.title: Aster Emerges: Astherus Rebrands to Lead Decentralized Perpetual Trading
evidence.notes: Project-issued release establishes March 31, 2025 as the public Aster rebrand marker.

evidence.title: Aster DEX
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading site confirms that the Aster venue remains active.

evidence.title: APX Token Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party migration page publishes the staged APX-to-ASTER exchange schedule.
